---
title: "glm_fit"
generated: true
description: "Fit a mass-univariate GLM: shared design `X`, per-element responses."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:glm_fit -->
```python
glm_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, family: Union[str, Family] = GAUSSIAN, weights: Optional[Float[Array, 'N']] = None, rank: Optional[int] = None, n_iter: int = 25, ridge: float = 0.0, block: Optional[int] = None) -> GLMResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:glm_fit -->
Fit a mass-univariate GLM: shared design `X`, per-element responses.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:glm_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` responses -- `V` elements, `N` observations. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` design, shared across elements (include your own intercept column -- no intercept is added). |
| `family` | `Union[str, Family]` | — | `GAUSSIAN` | Exponential family + link: a built-in name (`'gaussian'` / `'binomial'` / `'poisson'`) or a `Family` instance. Default `GAUSSIAN` identity = OLS. |
| `weights` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N']]` | — | `None` | Optional `(N,)` prior observation weights (WLS / known precision). `None` is unweighted. |
| `rank` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Effective rank of `X` for the residual degrees of freedom (dispersion / SE / AIC). `None` (default) detects it host-side (`matrix_rank`) when `X` is concrete, falling back to `p` under `jax.jit`; pass it explicitly for a known rank-deficient design traced under `jit`. |
| `n_iter` | `int` | — | `25` | IRLS iterations for non-Gaussian families (ignored on the OLS path). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Optional L2 stabiliser added to the normal-equation matrix. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Optional element-block size bounding peak memory on the per-element IRLS path (non-Gaussian families). `None` (default) is a single `vmap`; the OLS fast path is already vectorised and ignores it. |

**Returns** `GLMResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:glm_fit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
